subject: English

lesson.story_mission: Join the Sentence Lab team to edit and combine Grade 4 sentences with care.
lesson.objective: I can edit capitalization, punctuation, commas, quotation marks, verb tense, complete sentences, and combine related ideas.
lesson.concept_explanation: Language conventions help readers understand meaning; strong editors check capitals, punctuation, verb tense, complete sentences, and combined ideas.
lesson.common_misconception: Some writers fix one convention but leave capitalization, punctuation, tense, fragments, or sentence combining errors unchecked.
lesson.real_world_connection: Grade 4 writers use this skill for reading responses, science notes, social studies projects, and stories classmates can follow.
lesson.lesson_summary: Language conventions help readers understand meaning; strong editors check capitals, punctuation, verb tense, complete sentences, and combined ideas.
lesson.mini_lesson: Read the prompt, plan the needed parts, draft a clear answer, and reread with the checklist before you submit.

worked_examples.prompt: Study the model and name why it works.
worked_examples.correct_answer: The model includes the required parts and is easy for a reader to follow.
worked_examples.explanation: The model names the purpose, includes support, and rereads for clarity.

audio.text: The model includes the required parts and is easy for a reader to follow.
audio.label: Listen

worked_examples.prompt: Revise the draft using the checklist.
worked_examples.correct_answer: A stronger draft adds the missing part and checks conventions.
worked_examples.explanation: Revision improves meaning and correctness without changing the writer’s voice.

audio.text: A stronger draft adds the missing part and checks conventions.
audio.label: Listen

story.text: Read This Page. Welcome to the Grade 4 writing studio for Grammar, Conventions, and Sentence Combining. You will plan, test, revise, and explain choices the way a real author does. Press Start Mission when you are ready to build a clear response.
story.label: Read This Page

lesson.text: Read This Page. This mini lesson teaches i can edit capitalization, punctuation, commas, quotation marks, verb tense, complete sentences, and combine related ideas. First, study the model. Then name the parts that make the writing or sentence work. Press Next after you can explain the strategy in your own words.
lesson.label: Read This Page

watch.text: Read This Page. On this Watch page, listen to the teacher think aloud. Notice how the model checks the prompt, chooses useful words, and avoids a common mistake. Press Next to try a supported demo.
watch.label: Read This Page

demo.text: Read This Page. This demo is a safe practice round. Read the sentence or paragraph aloud, point to the evidence in the visual model, and decide what needs to be added or revised. Press Next when you are ready for Practice.
demo.label: Read This Page

practice.text: Read This Page. Practice time. Read the item, use the visual model, and press Read Question if you want the exact prompt read aloud. Use Listen for model sentences, paragraph examples, dialogue, or grammar support before you answer.
practice.label: Read This Page

challenge.text: Read This Page. Challenge time asks you to use i can edit capitalization, punctuation, commas, quotation marks, verb tense, complete sentences, and combine related ideas with less help. Press Read Question for the prompt, use Listen when hearing the sentence helps, and check that your response matches every part of the task.
challenge.label: Read This Page

checkpoint.text: Read This Page. Checkpoint time shows what you can do independently. Press Read Question if you want narration and use Listen for model language support. Answer carefully, then review the feedback and misconception notes.
checkpoint.label: Read This Page

badge.text: Read This Page. This badge celebrates your Grade 4 work on Grammar, Conventions, and Sentence Combining. You practiced planning, revising, and checking your words for readers. Keep using the strategy in class writing, reading responses, and projects.
badge.label: Read This Page

profile.text: Read This Page. Your profile saves stars, accuracy, hints, and level progress. If one level needs more work, choose Practice This Skill and return to the Skill Practice Center. Strong writers revise one focused skill at a time.
profile.label: Read This Page
